stocks.impact_theory: US-Iran ceasefire announcement on April 8 led to broad market relief rally, boosting risk appetite for high-beta tech stocks. Semis like AXTI benefit from AI demand and lower inflation fears from falling oil. Market psychology: fear to greed shift. Historical parallel: 2022 post-Russia-Ukraine de-escalation rallies. Analogies: Releasing pressure from a pressure cooker; sunlight after storm clearing investor clouds.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 17% surge on earnings optimism ahead of Q1 report April 30, AI indium phosphide expansion, high volume, positive X mentions in rally context. Ceasefire amplifies momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +20% gains targeting 72 (52w high), high volume supports.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short risky, avoid; potential -5% pullback to 55.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Earnings miss, broader semi rotation, ceasefire breakdown spiking oil.

stocks.justification: High volume 2.7x avg, specific news + macro tailwind, strong X engagement.

stocks.impact_theory: Ceasefire eases energy costs, boosts clean energy plays like fuel cells for AI data centers. Psychology: Shift to growth bets. Parallel: Post-2020 COVID vaccine rallies in renewables. Analogies: Wind filling sails of growth ship; fertilizer on growth crops.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 8%+ move on AI data center hype, Motley Fool buys, 1.6x volume, X lists in top movers.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: High valuation, competition in fuel cells, macro slowdown.

stocks.justification: Consistent mentions in growth lists, volume surge, macro fit.

stocks.impact_theory: Rally lifts AI test equipment stocks, backlog surge despite weak quarter. Psychology: FOMO on AI theme. Parallel: 2023 AI boom post-ChatGPT. Analogies: Testing ground for rocket before launch; polishing diamond before sale.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 7%+ gain, all-time high on backlog, X photonics mention, 5x avg vol.

stocks.justification: Strong news but higher vol stock.

stocks.impact_theory: Risk-on favors space/defense on NASA contracts, PExT extension. Psychology: Adventure bets in bull. Parallel: SpaceX hype 2021. Analogies: Orbit boost from macro gravity; satellite launch window.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: 13%+ move, NASA backing, 2.9x vol, X in movers.

stocks.impact_theory: Lower oil from ceasefire boosts travel/rental demand. Psychology: Vacation mode on. Parallel: Post-COVID travel boom. Analogies: Cheaper gas filling rental cars; tailwind for road trip.
